frontmatter.description: MS Sans Serif and MS Serif have been locked inside .FON binary files since 1987. This is the story of getting them out and shipping them as an npm package anyone can install.
frontmatter.title: Windows 95 fonts for the modern web
Windows 95 fonts for the modern web
